measurement_note: Size is n, the positive integer being factored. The legal prime sizes 61/251/997 span more than 16x, and k = n forces a missing-rank verdict after the full search. The reference examines divisor pairs only through sqrt(n), while a correct baseline that checks every candidate through n takes O(n), completes normally at n = 997, and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: prime n = 61 with missing rank
benchmark: prime n = 251 with missing rank
benchmark: prime n = 997 with missing rank
